code:
def ford_fulkerson(graph, source, sink):
    n = len(graph)
    residual_graph = [row[:] for row in graph]
    max_flow = 0

    while True:
        parent = [-1] * n
        queue = []
        
        queue.append(source)
        parent[source] = source  # Mark source as visited
        
        path_found = False
        head = 0
        while head < len(queue):
            u = queue[head]
            head += 1

            for v in range(n):
                if parent[v] == -1 and residual_graph[u][v] > 0:
                    parent[v] = u
                    queue.append(v)
                    if v == sink:
                        path_found = True
                        break
            if path_found:
                break

        if not path_found:
            break

        path_flow = float('inf')
        s = sink
        while s != source:
            p = parent[s]
            path_flow = min(path_flow, residual_graph[p][s])
            s = p

        max_flow += path_flow
        s = sink
        while s != source:
            p = parent[s]
            residual_graph[p][s] -= path_flow
            residual_graph[s][p] += path_flow
            s = p
            
    return max_flow
